name: Insulated Travel Mug
image_alt: Stainless travel mug on a desk
lead: Double-wall insulation keeps drinks hot or cold for hours on the go.
description: Leak-proof lid with a slide-lock opening and a fit that works in most car cup holders.

name: Bluetooth Earbuds
image_alt: White wireless earbuds in charging case
lead: Compact true wireless earbuds with crisp audio and a pocket-sized charging case.
description: Touch controls active noise reduction and up to 24 hours of total battery with the case.

name: Canvas Tote Bag
image_alt: Natural canvas tote bag with handles
lead: Spacious everyday tote made from heavy-duty cotton canvas.
description: Reinforced handles interior pocket and machine-washable fabric for errands or the beach.

name: Desk Organizer Set
lead: Bamboo desktop organizer with slots for pens notes and small accessories.
description: Modular trays keep supplies tidy and add a clean natural look to any workspace.

name: Weighted Throw Pillow
lead: Soft square accent pillow with a removable cover and plush fill.

name: Stainless Lunch Box
lead: Three-compartment lunch box with a secure snap lid for meal prep.

name: Resistance Band Set
lead: Set of five latex bands with varying resistance levels for home workouts.

name: Glass Food Storage Set

name: Rechargeable Desk Fan

lead: Quiet USB-powered desk fan with adjustable tilt and two speed settings.

name: Leather Belt
